name: studio.get_form
description: Fetch a single form's definition: fields, validation rules, destination (email/webhook), and enabled state.
whenToUse: Review a form's field schema before drafting messaging that references specific fields.
Diagnose: 'is this form disabled, or is the destination misconfigured' — fetch to inspect.
Export: convert a form definition to JSON for documentation or cross-site cloning.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants submission rows — use studio.list_form_submissions; this skill returns schema, not entries.
Caller has no form_id — use studio.list_forms to discover first.
Caller wants to edit the form — out of scope for the v1 skill pack; operator-console-only.
